rationale: Added a minimal preamble defining KeyTrait, VerusClone, and a StrictlyOrderedVec<K> backed by Seq<K> with #[verifier::ext_equal] so structural equality coincides with view equality. The inserted proof block asserts the postcondition implication via assert ... by, doing a case split on the antecedent: when both post views equal the same subrange concatenation, =~= on the Seq field and on the struct closes the proof. Verus exits 0.
